results.title: Trump says Iran has agreed not to have a nuclear weapon
results.description: The US President also said he would probably meet with Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei at some point if things "work out".

results.title: Candidates advance in redrawn congressional districts
results.description: (The Center Square) – Several candidates across altered congressional districts in California are projected to head to November’s general election. California voters passed Proposition 50, a measure that altered congressional districts in the state, aiming to add more Democrat representatives in Congress, but in one redrawn district, results could position one Republican against another Republican [...] The post Candidates advance in redrawn congressional districts appeared first on The Black Chronicle .

results.title: Iranian Army vows relentless defense of Islamic Revolution ideals against threats
results.description: Tehran, IRNA – The Iranian Army, in a statement, has stressed that it has “never ceased for a single moment” its efforts to defend the ideals of the late founder of the Islamic Republic, Imam Khomeini and the martyred Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, pledging to stand firmly against any threat targeting the Iranian nation.

results.title: Principle, not politics: Pawan Kalyan on his backing for Telangana
results.description: Jana Sena chief Pawan Kalyan said in an X post that his support for Telangana statehood was a matter of principle, not politics, tracing it to his 2009 stand.

results.title: Bucks Council spent no money addressing graffiti or flags on lampposts linked to divisive Raise the Colours protests
results.description: Buckinghamshire Council says it has spent no money removing St George’s Cross graffiti or flags associated with Operation Raise the Colours.
